rationale: Gov't Code §2306.1074 governs first-time homebuyer mortgage loan eligibility income limits. It does not reference or depend on the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount, so raising the exemption creates no conflict.
quote: To be eligible for a mortgage loan under this subchapter, a homebuyer must:
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns mortgage loan eligibility criteria unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
